channel.title: Lucaji on Lucaji’s GitHub Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Lucaji on Lucaji’s GitHub Pages

item.title: Welcome to Lucaji’s Pages - Bio
item.description: I AM AVAILABLE FOR HIRE. Within these pages you will find a selection of my projects, ideas, works and krim-krams. I have included my bio and a list of my skills you can have a look at by reading this very article.
